about.title: About Me
about.name: Tiago Santos Bela
about.description01: I am a Computer Science student and a software development enthusiast. Since an early age, I have shown interest in technology and problem-solving, constantly seeking to transform ideas into practical and functional solutions.
about.description02: Throughout my studies at UESB, I have been developing technical and analytical skills in programming, systems architecture, robotics, prototyping, team management, hardware, and software development best practices. I am committed to continuous learning and strive to evolve both technically and in my ability to build efficient, scalable, and well-structured solutions.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Some of my soft skills that can contribute positively to a professional work environment

habilities.title: Skills
habilities.html: HTML is the standard markup language used to structure content on the web.
habilities.css: CSS is used to style web pages by controlling colors, spacing, fonts and layouts.
habilities.javascript: JavaScript is a versatile programming language widely used in web development.
habilities.typescript: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that adds static typing.
habilities.react: React is a JavaScript library for building modern and reusable user interfaces.
habilities.node: Node.js allows JavaScript execution outside the browser using Google's V8 engine.
habilities.java: Java is an object-oriented and cross-platform programming language used worldwide.
habilities.cpp: C++ is a compiled multi-paradigm programming language widely used for high-performance applications.
habilities.haskell: Haskell is a strongly typed functional programming language.
habilities.prolog: Prolog is a logic programming language commonly used in artificial intelligence.
habilities.sql: SQL is used to store, query and manipulate relational database data.

formation.title: Education
formation.degreeTitle: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science - In Progress
formation.degreeDescription: As a Computer Science student, I have built a solid foundation in core computing concepts, including algorithms, data structures, computation theory, human-computer interaction, and other essential topics highly valued in the technology industry.
formation.typescriptDescription: The TypeScript program at DIO provided a strong foundation in using TypeScript to build safer, scalable, and maintainable applications while integrating front-end and back-end development concepts.
formation.reactDescription: This program provided comprehensive knowledge of React, covering components, hooks, state management, props, and lifecycle concepts for building dynamic and reusable user interfaces.
formation.javascriptDescription: The JavaScript program covered core language concepts such as data types, control structures, functions, arrays, objects, DOM manipulation, events, and software development best practices.
formation.javaDescription: Learned Java fundamentals, object-oriented programming, Spring Boot API development, database persistence, relational and non-relational databases, and AWS cloud fundamentals.
formation.javaAndAITitle: Globant - Java & Spring Boot AI Developer - Completed
formation.javaAndAIDescription: Fullstack course focused on Java and Artificial Intelligence. Covers object-oriented programming, automated testing and design patterns with Java, as well as prompt engineering and AI agent development. Includes hands-on projects integrating both areas.
formation.javaBackendTitle: Santander 2026 - AI Java Back-end - In Progress
formation.javaBackendDescription: Building robust and secure back-end systems with Java, learning Java fundamentals and syntax, building secure REST APIs with Spring Boot and Spring Security, applying Clean Architecture principles, and integrating with external services such as Whisper to create an intelligent voice virtual assistant as a final project.

items.name: Website Clothing

items.description: Application that searches GitHub profiles and displays repositories and user information.

items.description: Gym website project built with React and Bootstrap.

items.name: Pokédex
items.description: Application that consumes the PokeAPI REST API to display Pokémon information.

items.name: Love Films
items.description: Movie search application integrated with a movie information API.

items.name: Healthcare System
items.description: Vaccination management system designed to improve communication between patients and healthcare units.

items.name: App Budgeting
items.description: Voice-based financial control app. The user sends an audio describing a transaction, and the AI automatically transcribes, interprets, and records it.

items.name: App E-commerce Sale
items.description: ERP system focused on clothing, developed as a fullstack project consisting of a Spring Boot backend and a TypeScript frontend using Vite. The goal is to simulate a product sales management system, allowing product registration, sales recording, and metrics visualization through a dashboard.
